results.rendered_html: matsyāvatAra m. ‘fish-descent’, N. of the first of the 10 incarnations of Viṣṇu (who became a fish to save the 7th Manu from the universal deluge; the conversation between them forms the Matsya-Purāṇa q.v.; in  MBh. i.  the fish is represented as an incarnation of Brahmā; cf.  IW. 327, 397  &c.)
